safety: This public decision record contains only gate status, owner roles, non-sensitive evidence references, and release intent.
Do not add API keys, tokens, Bitwarden values, .env contents, provider responses, screenshots, QR codes, login state, or runtime/private paths.
Use approved only after the release owner or relevant maintainer has reviewed the external setting or evidence.

decisions.title: GitHub branch protection
decisions.decision: Confirm whether main has branch protection or a repository ruleset with Verify required.
evidence: Repository maintainer configured active Protect main ruleset for the default branch with required Verify, deletion restriction, and non-fast-forward restriction.
decisions.notes: Record only public-safe evidence such as GitHub UI setting names or sanitized github:safety output.

decisions.title: GitHub secret scanning and push protection
decisions.decision: Confirm secret scanning and push protection for the public repo and internal companion repo.
evidence: Repository maintainer confirmed public repo secret scanning and push protection are enabled; internal companion repo security settings were reviewed and currently show no Secret Protection, secret scanning, or push protection entry.
decisions.notes: Do not test by committing sample secrets or pasting secret-looking values into issues, PRs, docs, logs, or chat.

decisions.title: v0.1 release channel and npm publish decision
decisions.decision: Choose whether v0.1 stays repository-local, ships as a GitHub Release, or publishes @xiaoqi-ai/ai-link to npm.
decisions.notes: If selectedChannel is npm-public, review npm ownership, package contents, rollback policy, and npm publish dry-run before approval.

decisions.title: Provider-live credentials and cost approval
decisions.decision: Confirm Bitwarden/GitHub provider-live setup and approve the minimal live provider verification cost boundary.
requiredFor: public claim of live provider verification
decisions.notes: Evidence should be sanitized command names, artifact paths under runtime/tmp, or GitHub Actions artifact names; never include raw provider responses or secret values.
